description_text: WELCOME TO MY STORE STORE HOME ABOUT US ADD TO FAVORITES NEW ARRIVALS ENDING SOON CONTACT US 4X BLACK BUMPER LIP FINS CANARDS SPLITTER DIFFUSER SPOILER VALENCE CHIN SPORTY DESCRIPTION This listing is for one set (2 pieces for each side) of new design black front bumper canards splitters. This canards splitters made by paintable flexible Polyurethane, with special sharp looking design. It can give you a very sport looking, but also can protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damages. Feature One set (4 pieces) of front bumper canards splitters 2 small and a big size canards with installation hardwares Material: paintable Polyurethane Length: 2 pieces 10", 2 pieces 12" Universal fit most of cars PAYMENT SHIPPING RETURN FEEDBACK ABOUT US 1. We accept payment via PAYPAL only. 2. eCHECK from PayPal will only be processed once the payment clears. 3. Payment must be made within 4 days of auction closing. 4. Total amount due includes the final auction price plus Shipping & Handling. 5. Shipping & Handling will be determined based upon the SHIP TO address.
